concerns.text: T006 verification states 'fields documented and testable' but does not specify what tests must verify or pass criteria. Compare to T007/T009/T010 which have explicit verification criteria (e.g., 'unit tests in tests/unit/test_validator.py demonstrating flag generation'). Implementer cannot deterministically confirm completion.

T013 lacks verification criteria beyond 'fetch from https://katlas.org with retry logic'. No success criteria specified (e.g., 'verified by successful download of at least one record' or 'retry logic tested with simulated failures'). Implementer cannot confirm task completion deterministically.

T016 references FR-002 but does not embed FR-002's specific thresholds (null percentage ≤ 5%, format pass rate ≥ 99%, duplicate records = 0) in the verification criteria. Implementer cannot determine what constitutes 'data cleaning to flag nulls' completion without reading FR-002. Self-contained task requirement violated.

T057 lists test function names (test_download_retry_logic, test_download_partial_cache, test_download_timeout) but does not specify what each test must verify or assert. 'Write unit tests' fails concrete deliverable requirement; 'Add tests/test_downloader.py::test_download_retry_logic that verifies exponential backoff delays 1s→2s→4s on simulated failures' would pass.

T007 verification states 'all stochastic operations in code/__init__.py have pinned seeds documented in docs/reproducibility/random_seeds.md'. If code/__init__.py contains no stochastic operations, this verification becomes impossible to complete (vacuous truth ambiguity). Verification criteria should be conditional or specify minimum seed count.

T065 verification states 'title-token-overlap >=0.7 threshold verification per Constitution Principle II' but does not specify how to execute this verification (e.g., 'run Reference-Validator Agent on all citations in code/reproducibility/citation_validator.py'). Implementer lacks execution path.

T066 verification states 'Advancement-Evaluator Agent integration per Constitution Principle V' but does not specify what artifact or output confirms integration (e.g., 'content hash recorded in state/projects/PROJ-552-quantifying-the-complexity-of-knot-diagr.yaml artifact_hashes map'). Verification is not executable without additional specification.

T046 lists required derivation notes content (formula citations, step-by-step logic, parameter values, justifications) but does not specify verification method (e.g., 'validation script confirms all four sections present with non-empty content'). Implementer cannot deterministically confirm task completion.
